description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of white and stone-textured surfaces. The front showcases a large, horizontal balcony with a pergola and a swimming pool, complemented by lush greenery and palm trees. The ground level includes a gated entrance, a garage, and landscaped planters integrated into the design. The side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy, while the upper floor extends over the lower level, creating shaded outdoor spaces. The use of glass railings and large windows on the front and side enhances natural light and visual openness. The overall design emphasizes contemporary aesthetics, outdoor living, and integration with urban surroundings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a prominent balcony, swimming pool, and lush landscaping, featuring clean lines and a mix of white and stone finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, balcony with pergola, swimming pool, and extensive greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone accent wall, palm tree, and minimal window openings for privacy.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, limited windows, and a small planter in the corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the balcony, glass railings, and additional landscaping along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
